calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant: Counsel Jeffrey B. Workman appears for Luisa Hanson.
Respondent:Maristela De Souza appears with counsel Jose F. Vegara and Portugese interpreter Helen Susi.
Parites, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

11:30am
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Judgment Entered
